bulletin.item: Christmas Eve midnight service, December 24, 2026, all are welcome.
Family lunch fellowship continues Sundays at 1:00 PM.
Sunday worship 8:30 AM to 12:30 PM, greeting at 8:00 AM.
Meal support list open for congregants recovering at home.
Mother day recognition planned for May 9, 2027.
Deacon board minutes filed, see document P05.
